backend/main.mo: Actor canister with access control providing user profile management plus public contact‑form submission and admin‑only retrieval.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping product features to source files, components, tests, and metadata.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: List of prewritten one‑sentence summaries for all frontend project files.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base styles defining OKLCH color tokens, light/dark theme variables, and global background/text rules.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point mounting the React app and loading main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Sets up TanStack Router with layout and routes for Home, About, Services, and Contact.
frontend/src/components/layout/Footer.ts: Footer showing clinic info, contact links, navigation shortcuts, and attribution.
frontend/src/components/layout/HeaderNav: Responsive header with logo, navigation links, mobile menu, and call button highlighting the active route.
frontend/src/components/layout/SiteLayou: Layout wrapper rendering header, page content, and footer.
frontend/src/config/clinicConfig.ts: Centralized config defining clinic details, services, hero content, and about text.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor based on the current Internet Identity, refreshing dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context, including identity loading, login, logout, and status tracking.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for submitting and fetching contact form submissions using the backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Configures Tailwind CSS layers and defines light/dark theme variables and utility classes for a medical blue color scheme.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/About.tsx: Renders the clinic's About page with story, mission, and values sections using clinicConfig content.
frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx: Implements a contact form with validation, backend submission, success/error handling, and embedded map display.
frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx: Displays the homepage hero section and feature blocks, with navigation support for booking appointments.
frontend/src/pages/Services.tsx: Renders the Services page with hero, service list from clinicConfig, and a CTA section including navigation to contact form and phone link.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Provides utilities for reading, storing, persisting, and clearing URL and session parameters, including hash-based routing support.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending colors, animations, container settings, and enabling typography, container queries, and animate plugins.
project_state.json: Describes the project’s goals, design requirements, known issues, image needs, and implemented features for the clinic website.
